local_dishes.name: Caprese Salad
local_dishes.description: Mozzarella, tomatoes, basil, and olive oil (best in Campania)
source_files: France/All Inclusive Guide- Paris, Switzerland and Italy.pdf

local_dishes.name: Parmigiana di Melanzane
local_dishes.description: Layered eggplant, tomato sauce, mozzarella, and Parmigiano baked to perfection
source_files: France/All Inclusive Guide- Paris, Switzerland and Italy.pdf

local_dishes.name: Cacio e Pepe
local_dishes.description: Roman classic pasta with pecorino cheese and black pepper
source_files: France/All Inclusive Guide- Paris, Switzerland and Italy.pdf

local_dishes.name: Parmigiana di Melanzane (Eggplant Parmesan)
local_dishes.description: Layered eggplant, tomato sauce, mozzarella, and Parmigiano baked to perfection

local_dishes.name: Pasta al Pesto
local_dishes.description: Trofie pasta with basil pesto (Liguria's pride)

local_dishes.name: Risotto ai Funghi Porcini
local_dishes.description: Creamy risotto with porcini mushrooms

local_dishes.name: Pizza Margherita
local_dishes.description: The Naples original with tomato, mozzarella, and basil

local_dishes.name: Pollo alla Cacciatora (Hunter's Chicken)
local_dishes.description: Chicken braised with tomatoes, garlic, rosemary, and wine

local_dishes.name: Spaghetti alle Vongole
local_dishes.description: Pasta with clams, garlic, olive oil, and white wine (must-try in Naples or Venice)

local_dishes.name: Risotto al Nero di Seppia
local_dishes.description: Venetian specialty risotto with cuttlefish and squid ink

local_dishes.name: Truffles
local_dishes.description: Dug up from the forests of Umbria, Piedmont and Tuscany. White truffles are rare with distinctive aroma, black truffles are more available and less fragrant

connectivity_tips.tip: You can purchase a TSIM Unlimited Europe SIM card which will work in both Switzerland and Italy

connectivity_tips.tip: You can activate international roaming packs on your India number as an alternative
connectivity_tips._source_file: Italy/All Inclusive Guide- Aayush and Sonal- Switzerland and Italy.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Ensure your roaming is activated to receive SMS such as for OTPs even if you don't purchase an international roaming pack
